data.name: The Assistant Season 2
data.detailed_description:
The Assistant is a choice-driven adult Visual Novel that combines adventure, suspense, action and sex. You play as a young man who gets a new job as a personal assistant for a wealthy family. You will meet the family members and see how your entire life changes because of this new job.

IMPORTANT: For a better and more complete experience, we recommend playing The Assistant Season 1 first.

In any case, you can play The Assistant Season 2 without having previously played Season 1.

About Season 2:

Continue the adventure, discovering new plots and twists in the main story, while trying to prevent the demolition of Sister Clarice's school and trying to put Igor Spaski behind bars. Additionally, you will continue to get to know the girls in the game better.

Main features of this season:

  • 24 girls to meet and interact with (Added 5 new girls)

  • 3520 Images

  • 295 Animations

  • Ambient music and sound effects

  • A scene gallery to revisit the lustful scenes whenever you want

  • You can activate an in-game walkthrough to assist you with important decisions

During the game, you will find yourself entangled in a plot of corruption, drugs, and crimes due to an unscrupulous sinister businessman. You will have to decide how to help the family confront this challenge.

YOU CONTROL THE STORY

The decisions you make will shape the course of the game. You decide how to interact with each girl, being able to act as either a good guy or a bad guy. Each main character in the game has 2 or 3 different paths, depending on the decisions you make.

data.short_description: The Assistant is a choice-driven adult Visual Novel that combines adventure, suspense, action and sex. You play as a young man who gets a new job as a personal assistant for a wealthy family. You will meet the family members and see how your entire life changes because of this new job.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or any newer version of Windows
  • 處理器: Core 2 Duo 2.0 GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible with OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c.
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X Yosemite 10.10
  • 處理器: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system.
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9, OpenGL ES 2 or WebGL
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡:
